testcase.name: test_create_command_requires_write_permission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_approval_deployment_browser.py:45: in test_create_command_requires_write_permission assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create command failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create command failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_approve_command_with_write_permission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_approval_deployment_browser.py:60: in test_approve_command_with_write_permission assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_approval_creates_command_queue_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_approval_deployment_browser.py:82: in test_approval_creates_command_queue_entry assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_command
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_approval_deployment_browser.py:111: in test_reject_command assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_pending_commands
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_approval_deployment_browser.py:126: in test_get_pending_commands assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
